description_long: This trash bin is a medium-sized, octagonal wooden barrel with three prominent black metal bands reinforcing its structure. The wood has a dark, rich brown color with visible grain patterns, giving it a rustic appearance. The interior is partially filled with several large, white and pinkish objects resembling slabs of meat or fat, which are stacked irregularly. The rim of the bin is slightly beveled, and the metal bands are textured, suggesting durability and strength. There are no visible handles, wheels, or labeling on the exterior. The bin is open at the top, allowing easy access to its contents.
description: A dark wooden barrel-shaped trash bin with black metal bands and an open top, partially filled with white and pinkish slabs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, contents clearly visible, and the three black metal bands encircling the dark wooden body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden staves and the pinkish slabs protruding above the rim.
description_view_2: Rear angled view with less of the contents visible, focusing on the barrel's structure and metal bands.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the contents mostly obscured, emphasizing the barrel's octagonal shape and construction.
